executiveSummary.bluf: Continued Russian attacks on Ukrainian infrastructure; Gaza humanitarian operations underway; Sudan ferry disaster with 21+ casualties; Iran sanctions relief sentiment growing. No major escalation detected in primary theaters. Prediction markets show Fed chair nomination sentiment consolidating around Powell.

keyDevelopments: Iran: Growing political consensus across factions for sanctions relief; IRGC targeting reformist politicians
Gaza: UNDP began clearing massive wartime waste dump in Gaza City - humanitarian operation
Sudan: Ferry sinking in River Nile State with at least 21 dead; rescue operations ongoing for ~12 missing
Diplomacy: Indonesia's President Prabowo attending US 'Board of Peace' meeting; Jakarta preparing 8,000 troops for possible Palestinian enclave deployment
Information: Epstein Files release showing Israel ties receiving muted mainstream media coverage
Analysis: Historical scholarship on Arabic studies and Zionist colonization (context piece)
middleEast.assessment: Stable but tense. Iran internal pressure for sanctions relief building. Gaza humanitarian ops ongoing. Sudan tragedy not conflict-related. Indonesia's troop prep signals concern about regional escalation.
focusAreas: Sudan instability risk (ferry incident not conflict-linked but reflects infrastructure weakness)

keyDevelopments: Infrastructure: Russian attack cuts power to thousands of Ukrainians - continuing pattern
Diplomatic/Olympics: Ukrainian skeleton athlete Vladyslav Heraskevych banned from Winter Olympics for helmet honoring war dead (IOC decision)
Information: Russia attempting to block WhatsApp (cyber warfare)
Military: Russia firing barrages at Ukrainian cities
Economic: Labor shortage pushing Russia to recruit more Indian workers
Technology: Google warning about AI model theft and state-backed misuse (relevant to Ukraine cyber warfare)
ukraine.assessment: Continued Russian pressure on infrastructure. No major territorial changes. Olympic ban symbolic of continued diplomatic pressure. Russian labor shortages indicate strain but not near collapse.

keyDevelopments: North Korea: Seoul reports Kim Jong Un has chosen teenage daughter as heir apparent
Economics: US efforts to challenge China's critical minerals dominance
Taiwan: Leader seeking greater defense cooperation with Europe
pacific.assessment: Routine developments. No imminent conflict indicators. Leadership succession in North Korea notable but not destabilizing.

keyDevelopments: Canada: Police identify 18-year-old as suspect in Tumbler Ridge shooting (6 dead, dozens injured)
Bangladesh: Historic election following Gen Z protest ouster of former leader Hasina
Technology: Google AI model theft warning (state actors)
global.assessment: No direct security threats to monitored regions. Events largely domestic. Technology warning relevant to broader cyber security posture.
focusAreas: None - events are domestic/regional with limited geopolitical impact

keyDevelopments: Germany: Critical analysis of government stance on Israel
europe.assessment: No immediate threats. Policy debate ongoing but not escalatory.

keyDevelopments: None significant
us.assessment: No domestic threats detected. Diplomatic engagement (Board of Peace meeting) noted.

airspaceAndNotams.assessment: No NOTAM or military movement data available due to API failures (ICAO 403, FAA TFR parsing error). Unable to assess airspace posture.
airspaceAndNotams.recommendation: API access restoration critical for airspace monitoring. Alternative sources needed.

usMilitaryPosture.assessment: No US military movement data available. Unable to assess force posture or deployments.
usMilitaryPosture.recommendation: Data sources offline - alternative monitoring required.

polymarketIntelligence.insights: Fed chair markets overwhelmingly favor Powell reappointment (99.85%), suggesting market confidence in policy continuity. Bitcoin price recovery sentiment strengthening. Political markets dominated by 2028 speculation (low conviction, high volume).
polymarketIntelligence.geopoliticalMarkets: 60 active markets - no major price moves detected in last check.

watchList: Iran sanctions negotiations - internal pressure building
Sudan stability - infrastructure weakness exposed by ferry disaster
Indonesia's 'Board of Peace' meeting - potential for regional diplomatic developments
Russian labor shortages - indicator of strain but not near collapse
Bitcoin price recovery - cryptocurrency market sentiment shifting

trendAnalysis.shortTerm: Static. No escalation detected in primary conflict zones. Continued Russian infrastructure attacks in Ukraine expected to persist.
trendAnalysis.mediumTerm: Iran internal political pressure for sanctions relief may increase diplomatic activity. Gaza humanitarian ops may face continued challenges.
trendAnalysis.longTerm: Indonesia's troop preparation signals potential regional concern, but no imminent intervention indicators. Taiwan-Europe defense cooperation long-term trend continuing.

dataQualityIssues: GDELT: Rate limiting (429 errors), JSON parsing failures
RSS feeds: Multiple 403/404 errors (Reuters, ISW, CENTCOM, DoD, AP)
Overall: Significant degradation in data collection - only 39 events from last 4 hours vs expected 50+
recommendations: Restore API access for critical sources (ICAO, FAA, ACLED)
Investigate RSS feed failures (multiple 403/404 may indicate rate limiting or access changes)
Consider alternative data sources for NOTAMs and military movements
Implement data quality alerts when source failures exceed threshold
